text: An apartment with an open floor plan,  that also has a raspberry, peach and white motif, include an ornamental ceiling, a patterned floor,  a tightly arranged sitting  and desk area with a wide screen television and two small separate eating areas.
Old woman eating antepasta for her  lunch with tea.
There is a black refrigerator and dishwasher and wood cabinets.
Cupcakes sold by the roadside is a tempting sight.
a bunch of sheep that are eating on some grass
A cat sleeping in someone's brown overnight bag.
Two men sit on a black couch with a large window to their right.
The cows are lined up and stretching for their food.
A woman cutting a decorated cake on a table with liquor bottles.
A large multi layer wedding cake sitting on top of a table.
